title: PlanReviewPrecheckOutput
description: OUTPUT of `plan_review_precheck`: the DET-floor (P1-P9) result. `run_llm` is true iff the four-pass LLM review should run; `verdict` is the terminal short-circuit plan_review_verdict when it should NOT (exempt type or a P1/P5/P8 DET block), else null. The DET findings + coverage are threaded to the decide/coach ops.

run_llm.description: True iff the LLM review (assemble→batch→verify→decide→coach) should run.

verdict.description: The deterministic short-circuit plan_review_verdict (exempt PASS or DET BLOCK), else null.
